task_yaml.task:
I want to pull an artist's catalog from Apple's store data with an API rather
than scraping the Apple Music web player.

Here's the artist's Apple Music page:

    https://music.apple.com/us/artist/jack-johnson/909253

Apple runs a public store lookup service (the same data that powers iTunes /
Apple Music search) that isn't really documented but takes an Apple store id
as input. The numeric id is right there in the page URL. Please find that
lookup service and use it (not by scraping the Apple Music page DOM) to get:

- the artist's name and primary genre,
- a list of the artist's albums (collection name + release year) that the
  service returns when you ask it for this artist's albums.

Save the result to `/tmp_workspace/results/itunes_artist.json`, and save the
exact request URL(s) you called plus their raw JSON response(s) to
`/tmp_workspace/results/itunes_evidence/` so the pull is reproducible.

prompt:

Apple runs a public store lookup service (the same data that powers iTunes /
Apple Music search) that isn't really documented but takes an Apple store id
as input. The numeric id is right there in the page URL. Please find that
lookup service and use it (not by scraping the Apple Music page DOM) to get:

- the artist's name and primary genre,
- a list of the artist's albums (collection name + release year) that the

Save the result to `/tmp_workspace/results/itunes_artist.json`, and save the
